title: quercus ilex var. gramuntia
intro: Quercus ilex var. gramuntia, also known as the Pyrenean Oak, is a subspecies of the Holm Oak tree, native to the Pyrenees region in Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of tannins and other polyphenolic compounds. The health benefits of Quercus ilex var. gramuntia include its ability to protect against cardiovascular disease, cancer, and neurodegenerative disorders, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and improve cognitive function. In herbal preparations, Quercus ilex var. gramuntia is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
